title: The Wretched of the Earth
author: Frantz Fanon
content: “Each generation must, out of relative obscurity, discover its mission, fulfill it, or betray it.”
action: Ensure active, ground-level validation of your mission to prevent institutional inertia.

title: On Guerrilla Warfare
author: Mao Zedong
content: “The enemy advances, we retreat; the enemy camps, we harass; the enemy tires, we attack; the enemy retreats, we pursue.”
action: Utilize flexible, resource-efficient protocols to neutralize superior forces through attrition.

title: The Tipping Point
author: Malcolm Gladwell
content: “Ideas and products and messages and behaviors spread just like viruses do.”
action: Study the non-linear mechanics of how information reaches critical mass in your network.

title: Rules for Radicals
author: Saul Alinsky
content: “Power is not only what you have but what the enemy thinks you have.”
action: Leverage information asymmetry to manipulate the perceived boundaries of your conflicts.

title: The Prince
author: Niccolò Machiavelli
content: “Men are so simple and so subject to present necessities that he who seeks to deceive will always find someone who will allow himself to be deceived.”
action: Account for the inherent vulnerabilities in human cognition when planning or defending against strategic misdirection.
